title: Baby Bear
description: Let this Baby Bear facial gummy wash care for your skin this Easter with its soothing British honey, and hydrating carrageenan and glycerine base.
ingredients: Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Fruit Oil (Bergamot Oil)
Citrus Sinensis Peel Oil Expressed (Orange Oil)

images.alt: Baby Bear. A gelatinous facial gummy in the shape of a friendly bear face. The product is a pale caramel colour, complete with rounded ears, big eyes and a smiling mouth.

A pale, bear-shaped gummy facial cleanser rests on a folded white flannel by a white square basin. A light green cup holding two bamboo toothbrushes and a black tap are visible against pale green wall tiles.

A model holds a small, bear-shaped facial jelly in their hands to create a lather. The "Baby Bear" facial jelly has a simple, rounded face. In the background, a white sink, a towel, and a ceramic soap dish are visible against pale green wall tiles.

A reflection in a bathroom mirror of a smiling model with dark hair in bunches, applying a white foaming lather to their face, created by the "Baby Bear" gummy facial cleanser, against pale green tiles.

A reflection in a bathroom mirror of a smiling model with dark hair in bunches, applying a white foaming lather to their face, created by the "Baby Bear" gummy facial cleanser, against pale green tiles.
